ListYourVehicle.heroDescription: Add photos and details in four guided steps — our editorial team reviews every submission.
ListYourVehicle.photosIntro: Add clear exterior and interior shots. At least one image is required.
ListYourVehicle.photosHint: JPG or PNG recommended. Up to 12 files, max 10 MB each.
ListYourVehicle.photosErrorMin: Add at least one photo to continue.
ListYourVehicle.photosErrorSize: Each image must be 10 MB or smaller.
ListYourVehicle.photosErrorLimit: You can attach up to 12 images.
ListYourVehicle.detailsIntro: Tell us how the vehicle is equipped and titled.
ListYourVehicle.labelMileageHint: Odometer in miles/km depending on cluster — approximate is fine.
ListYourVehicle.placeholderDescription: Ownership history, service notes, standout options, imperfections…
ListYourVehicle.pricingIntro: Set how you’d like the vehicle marketed. You can revise this with concierge support later.
ListYourVehicle.reviewIntro: Confirm everything before you send it to editorial review.
ListYourVehicle.reviewPhotos: {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}} attached
ListYourVehicle.reviewAccuracy: The information provided is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
ListYourVehicle.reviewConsent: I agree that ABRIEV may contact me about this listing.
ListYourVehicle.reviewErrorTerms: Please confirm both boxes to submit.

Success.title: Your listing is in review.
Success.description: Thanks for completing the four steps. Our editorial team will reach out if we need anything else — watch your inbox for next steps.
